title: Kraków, Lesser Poland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kraków, Lesser Poland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kraków is a city in Lesser Poland with a population of 800,653. Poland’s cultural capital, home to the magnificent Wawel Castle, the historic Jewish quarter of Kazimierz, and one of Europe’s best-preserved medieval market squares.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
